messages.content: Hello! How can I assist you today?
can you check the CLI tool let me know what we need to update to run this ?

To check the CLI tool and determine what needs to be updated to run it, you can use the following command:

```sh
[NEED_EXTERNAL]
Check the version of the CLI tool and its dependencies. Run:
  cli-tool --version
  pip list --outdated
```

This will help you identify if there are any updates available for the CLI tool or its dependencies.
